title: Product gate decision report
summary: Record the M6 Web tier verdict, Windows external-test build verdict, blockers and residual risks from WM-0087 through WM-0095 evidence.
acceptance: Web tier verdict is one of same-spec, lower fast-forward, lower cap, demo-only or cancel
Windows external-test build verdict is explicit
Known blockers and residual risks are enumerated
Decision cites WM-0087 through WM-0095 evidence
Decision does not waive failed M0-M5 regression gates

history.details: Instantiated from reviewed WM-0084 M6 DAG; keep proposed until WM-0094 and WM-0095 are done.

Product gate decision recorded: Web verdict demo-only without canceling Web; Windows verdict ready-for-controlled-external-test as unsigned local directory build; blockers, owner gates, residual risks and WM-0087 through WM-0095 evidence cited; required checks passed.

verified: Independent reviewer Gate the 2nd verified WM-0096: Web verdict demo-only and not cancel, Windows external-test verdict bounded to unsigned local directory build, blockers/owner gates recorded, WM-0087 through WM-0095 evidence cited, no regression waiver and no M7/release/signing/telemetry scope crossing.
Integrated verified WM-0096 product-gate decision report.

objective: Make the M6 product-gate decision from reviewed Web, Windows, storage, security, accessibility, diagnostics, smoke and benchmark evidence.
forbiddenPaths: M7 store privacy or marketing material
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: Web cancel/demo-only decision needs owner approval before direction changes.
File ownership is limited to decision report and narrow roadmap/platform status markers.
ownerGate: Owner approval required before public release, store submission or paid asset/service decisions
Owner approval required if Web verdict cancels Web as a formal target
Block if any required evidence from WM-0087 through WM-0095 is missing
m0M5RegressionCoverage: Decision cannot waive failed regression gates
M5 final hashes and benchmark thresholds remain binding evidence
benchmarkImpact: Decision report summarizes benchmark evidence only; no threshold or baseline edits.
reviewRouting: project-director completes to reviewer; reviewer verifies that verdict follows evidence and does not overclaim.
rollbackModel: Revert decision report/status markers and leave M6 open until evidence supports a verdict.

sparkEligibility.reason: Product gate decision is project-director work and not Spark-eligible.

review.summary: Independent reviewer Gate the 2nd verified WM-0096: Web verdict demo-only and not cancel, Windows external-test verdict bounded to unsigned local directory build, blockers/owner gates recorded, WM-0087 through WM-0095 evidence cited, no regression waiver and no M7/release/signing/telemetry scope crossing.

integration.summary: Integrated verified WM-0096 product-gate decision report.
